subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath created all things for His recognition, through His word: "I was a Hidden Treasure and loved to be known; therefore I created." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی خلق الخلق لعرفانه بقوله کنت کنزا مخفیا فاحببت ان اعرف فخلقت
subcodes.subjects: @presence of; reunion with God, @Manifestation of God as mediator, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @Qur'an and Hadith quotation and interpretation, @rejection, opposition and persecution
